response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role, has no explicit React or Nest.js experience (only Ember.js), lacks PostgreSQL exposure, and shows minimal relevance to renewable energy or construction tech; their German language skill is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking (e.g., GISCollective, Kubernetes)
Proven ability to learn and adapt across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely high turnover risk
No demonstrated experience with React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL as required
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
